title: Graphene oxide, reduced graphene oxide, electrochemically exfoliated graphene, and biomass-derivated graphene for EMI shielding
author: Jovanovic, Svetlana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Collection of data for samples GO, rGO, exHOPG and biomass carbon 
 GO and rGO were produced using procedure published in  https://doi.org/10.3390/ijms252413401.  
 exHOPG was produced using procedure published in https://doi.org/10.3390/molecules30173579. 
 BA was produced using  https://doi.org/10.3390/nano14231882 . 
 VINCA_FTIR_BA.txt - FTIR data of carbon-based nanomaterial produced from biomass apple, file type .txt 
 VINCA_XPS_BA.txt - XPS data of graphene oxide and exfoliated graphene composites, file type .txt 
 UniOldenburg_Microstrip-based characterization - EMI shielding measurement description, file type .txt 
 VINCA_Raman_BA.txt – Raman spectroscopy measurement of BA, file type .txt
